config.script:
target=self.view.params.targetTable
	path="Insert/{}".format(target)
	parameters=system.util.jsonDecode(system.util.jsonEncode(self.props.data))
	if 'description' not in parameters.keys():
		parameters['description']=""
	parameters['is_active']=True
	parameters['{}_attributes_json'.format(self.view.params.targetDropDownID)]={}
	project=system.util.getProjectName()
	targetType=system.db.execQuery(path=path, parameters=parameters, project=project)
	self.view.refreshBinding("custom.targetTable.queryItems")
	self.reset()

transforms.code: return "Further {} Properties Can Be Defined After Creation".format(value.capitalize())

options=[]

		options.append({"value":item, "label":item})
	return options
return 'Additional {filler} Types can be added via the "Add {filler}" Button Below'.format(filler=value.capitalize())
